through that and get rid of that it's such a release and there's so much going on psychologically that I want to run you through so I think that will be my next episode but before I go I am going to let you know that I am going on tour again the tickets have been out for a week and a lot of things are selling quick so if you're going through a no contact type thing or you're dealing with wanting to make new friends or if you just need something to look forward to a date in the future come to one of my shows you're going to meet people just like you and a lot of people who are dealing with what you're dealing with and you'll be able to learn from each other how they're able to go through it I love my Live Events so much literally with my whole heart so if you're interested the link will be in the description along with all of my social media everything you need for me but if this was helpful or if you have any more tips for people leave a comment in this video and if you're listening to the audio version on Apple podcast and spotifi leave this podcast the five stars rating buy a ticket to the show follow me on my socials and don't reach out to their ass go look at my socials before you look at theirs ah but everything's going to be okay I promise it just feels like hell right

title: “No Contact” & Handling Breakups With Strength (Episode 120)
